$comment: Option A — match current indaco aesthetic (washy pastels). Two-tier: recessive (--cN-light, paired c-ink-light) AND prominent (--cN-dark, paired c-ink-dark). Same hue per slot across both registers — pie wedge (--cN-dark) and mermaid band (--cN-light) at slot 2 are now both in rust family, just at different lightness.

recessive.$comment: --cN-light: pale on light canvas (L≈0.87 over dark ink), deep on dark canvas (L≈0.45 under white ink). Mermaid band aesthetic.

prominent.$comment: --cN-dark: saturated mid-tone on light canvas (L≈0.40 under white ink), pale tint on dark canvas (L≈0.85 over dark ink). Inverted from recessive. Pie wedge / chart mark aesthetic.
